center.name: 聖安娜火山
center.summary: 聖安娜火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Lesser roadrunner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits open ground areas, with scrub and thorny bushes. They can be found in higher elevations of stratovolcanoes such as Conchagua, San Miguel, Santa Ana and San Salvador, in semi-open areas above the treeline.{{cite book|last1=Dickey|first1=D
